2:
Spare me your concern, pirate.
Your feeble attempts at extortion will not work on us.

Spare me your concern, pirate.
Your feeble attempts at extortion will not work on us.

6:
Gentlemen. Surely the fact that you have such limitless resources at your disposal gives you all the more reason to spare some few coins for the
less fortunate?

Gentlemen. Surely the fact that you have such limitless resources at your disposal gives you all the more reason to spare some few coins for the
less fortunate?

9:
They've always balked at paying the Ruby Tithe.
But they were never so eager to pick a fight...

They've always balked at paying the Ruby Tithe.
But they were never so eager to pick a fight...

20:
...All while our friend the viceroy continues her purge of Doma's “radical elements.” I believe she's holding court in one of the fishing villages even
as we speak.

...All while our friend the viceroy continues her purge of Doma's “radical elements.” I believe she's holding court in one of the fishing villages even
as we speak.

25:
If only you knew how commonplace such scenes have become.
Hmm... Are we too late?

If only you knew how commonplace such scenes have become.
Hmm... Are we too late?

29:
Filth and squalor everywhere I look. How very Doman.
What I wouldn't do for a drink...

Filth and squalor everywhere I look. How very Doman.
What I wouldn't do for a drink...

31:
'Tis better to bend with the wind than stand tall and be broken.
Therein lies...hope. Therein lies freedom.

'Tis better to bend with the wind than stand tall and be broken.
Therein lies...hope. Therein lies freedom.

55:
Hold out for as long as you can, but remember: noble sacrifices are to remain an absolute last resort. I wish I could say it won't come to that, but only the gods know how we're going to get you and the others out in one piece.
A miracle, perchance...

Hold out for as long as you can, but remember: noble sacrifices are to remain an absolute last resort. I wish I could say it won't come to that, but only the gods know how we're going to get you and the others out in one piece.
A miracle, perchance...

79:
We can't stand by and let innocent people suffer─here or anywhere else.
I'll do whatever it takes.

We can't stand by and let innocent people suffer─here or anywhere else.
I'll do whatever it takes.

92:
We, uh...appear to be standing inside a giant bubble.
By the Twelve...I think we're on the seabed!

We, uh...appear to be standing inside a giant bubble.
By the Twelve...I think we're on the seabed!

102:
From far above, you have journeyed here in search of our wisdom.
You shall have it.

From far above, you have journeyed here in search of our wisdom.
You shall have it.

103:
All creation is a tapestry, through which the divine is interwoven.
Kami are legion, and they can be found in the great and the small.

All creation is a tapestry, through which the divine is interwoven.
Kami are legion, and they can be found in the great and the small.

104:
Though they come and go as they please, they favor certain vessels.
The ancient. The precious. The exquisite.

Though they come and go as they please, they favor certain vessels.
The ancient. The precious. The exquisite.

118:
Delight not overmuch in such things, Soroban.
Now, tell our guests what must be done.

Delight not overmuch in such things, Soroban.
Now, tell our guests what must be done.

124:
O kami of the fathomless waters,
Of the fallen, the ascended, the flowing, and the becalmed,
Caretakers of the shallows and of the depths...

O kami of the fathomless waters,
Of the fallen, the ascended, the flowing, and the becalmed,
Caretakers of the shallows and of the depths...

125:
Receive of us our meager offerings,
Cleanse these ones of earth and stone, and grant them your blessing,
That they might drink deep of the divine...

Receive of us our meager offerings,
Cleanse these ones of earth and stone, and grant them your blessing,
That they might drink deep of the divine...

126:
The ritual is complete, my friends.
You may now breathe in the depths as you would upon land.

The ritual is complete, my friends.
You may now breathe in the depths as you would upon land.

132:
Hmm...skilled or no, your bodies are ill-suited to the sea.
Your cause demands alacrity, and you shall have it.

Hmm...skilled or no, your bodies are ill-suited to the sea.
Your cause demands alacrity, and you shall have it.

151:
Poor, poor Lord Kaien─kami rest his soul! Noble leader of a fallen nation...
A fine puppet he made for the viceroy─for a time.

Poor, poor Lord Kaien─kami rest his soul! Noble leader of a fallen nation...
A fine puppet he made for the viceroy─for a time.

153:
Tell me, how did it feel to fail him that day?
To live with the disgrace of his death.

Tell me, how did it feel to fail him that day?
To live with the disgrace of his death.

160:
To my dismay, the details escape me at present.
Mayhap your dog could jog my memory?

To my dismay, the details escape me at present.
Mayhap your dog could jog my memory?

164:
Thieves! Thieves! Come to steal our most precious treasures!
You will pay for this sacrilege!

Thieves! Thieves! Come to steal our most precious treasures!
You will pay for this sacrilege!

183:
And a horde of angry Kojin at our backs.
<sigh> This contest is getting worse by the moment.

And a horde of angry Kojin at our backs.
<sigh> This contest is getting worse by the moment.

190:
The Red have sounded the alarum. The Isle of Zekki under attack;
fierce fighting in the stronghold.

The Red have sounded the alarum. The Isle of Zekki under attack;
fierce fighting in the stronghold.

191:
The vault breached by outsiders, and strange tales from deep within.
All this, the Red cannot ignore.

The vault breached by outsiders, and strange tales from deep within.
All this, the Red cannot ignore.

192:
Even now, they abandon their posts and flock to the isle.
The Garleans are powerless to stop them.

Even now, they abandon their posts and flock to the isle.
The Garleans are powerless to stop them.

197:
Nor would anyone begrudge you a spot of revenge into the bargain.
Like the little miss said, we knew this day would come.

Nor would anyone begrudge you a spot of revenge into the bargain.
Like the little miss said, we knew this day would come.

201:
All that is theirs is ours for the taking─and take it we shall.
We will strip them of everything they hold dear!

All that is theirs is ours for the taking─and take it we shall.
We will strip them of everything they hold dear!

223:
Hear me, Kojin of the Red!
We have no quarrel with you─only your imperial masters!

Hear me, Kojin of the Red!
We have no quarrel with you─only your imperial masters!

230:
And full of vim and vigor, hah hah hah!
Did I not tell you I was no stranger to chains?

And full of vim and vigor, hah hah hah!
Did I not tell you I was no stranger to chains?

247:
I have faith that our allies yet live.
Once we have found them, we will plan our next step.

I have faith that our allies yet live.
Once we have found them, we will plan our next step.

258:
...Well, there's naught to be gained in belaboring the point.
All that remains is to administer your punishment.

...Well, there's naught to be gained in belaboring the point.
All that remains is to administer your punishment.

262:
And what do we have here? One of the vaunted treasures of the Red?
The craftsmanship is certainly impressive...
Mayhap we can use it to make amends.

And what do we have here? One of the vaunted treasures of the Red?
The craftsmanship is certainly impressive...
Mayhap we can use it to make amends.

264:
Is serving me really so unbearable?
At least pretend to enjoy it, you witless lump!

Is serving me really so unbearable?
At least pretend to enjoy it, you witless lump!

267:
Before us stood yet another wall, and through a great magitek field we glimpsed Doma Castle.
I'll never forget the sight...or the anger I felt that day.

Before us stood yet another wall, and through a great magitek field we glimpsed Doma Castle.
I'll never forget the sight...or the anger I felt that day.

268:
Life. Liberty. Hope. So much lost, so much taken.
As we walked through that war-torn land, no one said a word...

Life. Liberty. Hope. So much lost, so much taken.
As we walked through that war-torn land, no one said a word...

281:
(-Flustered Youth-)What? What are you going on about? Actually, never mind.
Just come with me─now!

(-Flustered Youth-)What? What are you going on about? Actually, never mind.
Just come with me─now!

286:
Yugiri! Gods, it's good to see you! You look great, by the way!
Have you been here long?

Yugiri! Gods, it's good to see you! You look great, by the way!
Have you been here long?

287:
I returned but recently, having concluded my mission.
Oh, it is good to see you again, my friends.

I returned but recently, having concluded my mission.
Oh, it is good to see you again, my friends.

288:
Did I hear aright? Your mission is concluded?
Then you have found the young master?

Did I hear aright? Your mission is concluded?
Then you have found the young master?

291:
We wanted to stay and fight, believe me, but we knew it wouldn't work.
We needed more time to rebuild─and more allies to stand with us against
the Empire.

We wanted to stay and fight, believe me, but we knew it wouldn't work.
We needed more time to rebuild─and more allies to stand with us against
the Empire.

297:
Until now. For I have found Lord Hien─seen and spoken with him.
On the Azim Steppe.

Until now. For I have found Lord Hien─seen and spoken with him.
On the Azim Steppe.

298:
O boundless and merciful kami, the young master lives!
Tell me, was he well? Did his wound yet ail him? Where is he now?
Have you brought him back to us!?

O boundless and merciful kami, the young master lives!
Tell me, was he well? Did his wound yet ail him? Where is he now?
Have you brought him back to us!?

306:
Nor I, shadow walker, nor I. But we need not rouse our comrades to battle
this day. Let us instead welcome our honored guests and allow them a
moment of respite.

Nor I, shadow walker, nor I. But we need not rouse our comrades to battle
this day. Let us instead welcome our honored guests and allow them a
moment of respite.

308:
Why are you milling about like a pack of slack-jawed mongrels!?
Form a line! Now!

Why are you milling about like a pack of slack-jawed mongrels!?
Form a line! Now!

320:
And we shall. But before all else, we must needs ascertain their destination.
I doubt this is the first village the Garleans have visited...nor is it like to
be the last.

And we shall. But before all else, we must needs ascertain their destination.
I doubt this is the first village the Garleans have visited...nor is it like to
be the last.

322:
Pray return to our headquarters and tell the others what you saw here.
Should we have need of reinforcements, I would know that they are ready.

Pray return to our headquarters and tell the others what you saw here.
Should we have need of reinforcements, I would know that they are ready.

328:
Are you mad!? There's no escaping the Empire!
Running will only make it worse!

Are you mad!? There's no escaping the Empire!
Running will only make it worse!

331:
You are Lord Hien's retainer?
Trained to fight without fear and obey without question?

You are Lord Hien's retainer?
Trained to fight without fear and obey without question?

337:
Too many battles, too much lost. Our friends, our family, even our liege.
We who survived are forced to bend the knee─to sell our souls and
surrender our dignity.

Too many battles, too much lost. Our friends, our family, even our liege.
We who survived are forced to bend the knee─to sell our souls and
surrender our dignity.

340:
You have made your plight clear, and I shall impose my will no more.
But know this, brothers and sisters of Doma.

You have made your plight clear, and I shall impose my will no more.
But know this, brothers and sisters of Doma.

342:
My lord─ My lord prays you value your life as highly as he does. As for me...I swear by all the kami in creation that I will free you from this torment.
No matter the cost.

My lord─ My lord prays you value your life as highly as he does. As for me...I swear by all the kami in creation that I will free you from this torment.
No matter the cost.

347:
It calms me, the sound.
It helps me to remember the sway of the ocean when I close my eyes...

It calms me, the sound.
It helps me to remember the sway of the ocean when I close my eyes...

348:
Despite the many great and noble things I said, in truth I am not of Doma.
I was born beneath the waves of the Ruby Sea...

Despite the many great and noble things I said, in truth I am not of Doma.
I was born beneath the waves of the Ruby Sea...

355:
Every day, I pray for my home, and for the people I left behind.
That they might be spared the wages of war, and live in peace, untouched by this madness.

Every day, I pray for my home, and for the people I left behind.
That they might be spared the wages of war, and live in peace, untouched by this madness.

374:
Though Yotsuyu governs Doma, Zenos remains the province's anointed viceroy─and it would seem he has come to assess the current situation
in person.

Though Yotsuyu governs Doma, Zenos remains the province's anointed viceroy─and it would seem he has come to assess the current situation
in person.

386:
...Mayhap I am a fool with foolish dreams of a future that will never be.
But I cannot─I will not forsake them!

...Mayhap I am a fool with foolish dreams of a future that will never be.
But I cannot─I will not forsake them!

390:
The village is not far, my lord.
If it please you, we shall escort you there directly.

The village is not far, my lord.
If it please you, we shall escort you there directly.

400:
Mayhap I shall test this new blade of yours. Let us hope it is to my liking,
lest your misfortunes compound.

Mayhap I shall test this new blade of yours. Let us hope it is to my liking,
lest your misfortunes compound.

401:
Then again, I am loath to expend such effort on the unworthy.
Come─earn the honor.

Then again, I am loath to expend such effort on the unworthy.
Come─earn the honor.

407:
For the rush of blood, for the time between the seconds─live.
For the sole pleasure left to me in this empty, ephemeral world─live!

For the rush of blood, for the time between the seconds─live.
For the sole pleasure left to me in this empty, ephemeral world─live!

413:
What you're doing is stupid and reckless and I never wanted any part of it,
but here we are!

What you're doing is stupid and reckless and I never wanted any part of it,
but here we are!

414:
I've spent my whole life hating myself─for every time they made me beg,
for every time I held my tongue to protect the people I love.

I've spent my whole life hating myself─for every time they made me beg,
for every time I held my tongue to protect the people I love.

427:
Stare any harder and you're like to burn a hole in them.
Go and say your piece for goodness' sake!

Stare any harder and you're like to burn a hole in them.
Go and say your piece for goodness' sake!

428:
I've got nothing more to say to them!
I'm going to find out how the others are getting on.

I've got nothing more to say to them!
I'm going to find out how the others are getting on.

429:
Gosetsu, Mistress Alisaie─I owe you an apology.
I acted with reckless disregard for my own safety, and endangered I know not how many others in so doing.

Gosetsu, Mistress Alisaie─I owe you an apology.
I acted with reckless disregard for my own safety, and endangered I know not how many others in so doing.

438:
I'm sorry we couldn't be there.
Alisaie made me swear to stay behind no matter what.

I'm sorry we couldn't be there.
Alisaie made me swear to stay behind no matter what.

455:
Because of your petty hatreds.
They render you the perfect instrument to bleed your kinsmen of hope─
to make an example of Doma, such as was ordered.

Because of your petty hatreds.
They render you the perfect instrument to bleed your kinsmen of hope─
to make an example of Doma, such as was ordered.

465:
Bwahahahaha! I've been waiting for this chance! I promise you, my lady─
<If(PlayerParameter(4))>she<Else/>he</If> won't escape this time! Not this time, oh no!

Bwahahahaha! I've been waiting for this chance! I promise you, my lady─
<If(PlayerParameter(4))>she<Else/>he</If> won't escape this time! Not this time, oh no!

468:
(-???-)...When his shade was banished, you swore to leave this life behind.
And yet here you are...

(-???-)...When his shade was banished, you swore to leave this life behind.
And yet here you are...

470:
I remember the emptiness. Vast and endless.
The Azim Steppe, home to countless roaming tribes.

I remember the emptiness. Vast and endless.
The Azim Steppe, home to countless roaming tribes.
